It belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, a diverse group of plants commonly known as the spurge family. Conchograecum reygaertii is further classified within the subfamily Acalyphoideae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Africa, where it grows in humid environments. The classification of Conchograecum reygaertii provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Euphorbiaceae family.
